About Us

More Than a Playgroup —
It's a Community

The Conscious Family Centre (CFC) is a nature-connected alternative education and family playgroup space in Abuja, designed for children ages 0 to 10. We offer stay-and-play sessions, a homeschool hub, and community support for parents and caregivers — all in one warm, intentional space.

🌳

Who We Are

We are a family-centred community in the heart of Wuse 2, Abuja. Nestled inside the beautiful BMT Garden, CFC is a breath of fresh air for modern families seeking intentional, play-based, and nature-rich childhood experiences. Every child who walks through our gates leaves with more curiosity, creativity, and confidence than they arrived with.

💛

What We Believe

We believe childhood should be unhurried, joyful, and full of wonder. We believe parents deserve a village — a community of like-minded families to lean on. We believe learning happens best when children are free to explore, create, get messy, and discover the world around them at their own pace.

🕙

Opening Hours

Monday – Saturday  |  10:00 AM – 3:00 PM  |  Located inside BMT Garden, Wuse 2, Abuja

🎯

Our Mission

To provide a safe, nurturing, and nature-rich environment where children aged 0–10 can learn through play, exploration, and creative expression — while building a strong, supportive community for families across Abuja. We are committed to holistic child development that honours each child's unique pace, curiosity, and spirit.

🌟

Our Vision

To be Nigeria's leading model for conscious, nature-connected family education — a place where every child is seen, every parent is supported, and every family thrives. We envision a generation of confident, compassionate, and creatively empowered children raised within a intentional, community-first culture.

Our Programmes

Experiences Designed to Inspire

From everyday play sessions to intensive skill programmes, CFC offers a rich range of experiences for children and families.

🎮

Stay & Play Sessions

Open drop-in play sessions for children ages 0–10 and their parents or caregivers. A relaxed, supervised, nature-rich environment perfect for socialisation, sensory play, and joyful free exploration. No rigid schedule — just beautiful, unhurried play.

📚

Homeschool Hub & Community

A dedicated support network and learning space for homeschooling families in Abuja. Structured enrichment sessions, resource sharing, collaborative learning groups, and a welcoming community of parents navigating the alternative education journey together.

👩‍🏫

Nanny Intensive Training

A professional development programme equipping nannies and caregivers with modern, child-centred skills. Covering child development, play-based learning, safety, emotional intelligence, and practical daily care — raising the standard of childcare across Abuja families.

🚀

Holiday Camps & S.T.E.A.M

Exciting school holiday programmes packed with Science, Technology, Engineering, Arts & Maths activities. Scavenger hunts, messy play experiments, team challenges, and creative builds — giving children an action-packed, educational holiday they'll never forget.

Core Activities

Everyday Magic at CFC

Woven into the fabric of every day at CFC are activities that light up children's minds, bodies, and hearts.

🌲

Forest School & Outdoor Play

Nature-based learning in the outdoors — climbing, exploring, building, and discovering the living world firsthand.

🎨

Creative Arts & Crafts

Painting, sculpting, building, and making — weekly hands-on creative sessions that nurture self-expression and imagination.

🎯

Weekly Enrichment Clubs

From music to storytelling to STEM tinkering — themed weekly clubs that deepen children's passions and skills.

🚌

Waka Wednesday Excursions

Every Wednesday, we venture out! Local outings, cultural trips, and community adventures that bring learning to life.

Get In Touch

Come Find Us

We'd love to welcome your family. Reach out, stop by, or follow our journey on social media.

FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before your first visit.

CFC welcomes children from 0 to 10 years old. Whether you have a baby, a toddler, or a school-age child, we have activities and programmes suited to their developmental stage.
Stay & Play sessions are drop-in friendly! You're welcome to come without prior booking during our open hours: Monday to Saturday, 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM. For specialised programmes like STEAM camps or Nanny Training, advance registration is required.
The Homeschool Hub is a community and resource space for families who educate their children outside of traditional school. It includes structured enrichment sessions, a peer community of parents, collaborative group learning, and access to educational resources tailored to the homeschool journey.
It's designed for nannies, au pairs, and home caregivers. The programme covers modern child development principles, play-based learning techniques, basic child safety, emotional intelligence, and practical care skills. Families who enrol their nannies consistently report significant improvements in childcare quality at home.
Every Wednesday, we take the kids out! Waka Wednesday excursions are curated outings to local parks, cultural sites, farms, museums, and community spaces around Abuja. It's a wonderful way to connect real-world experiences with learning in a fun, social setting.
We are inside BMT Garden, opposite the Legacy Centre, in Wuse 2, Abuja (FCT 904101). It's a beautiful garden setting that perfectly complements our nature-connected philosophy. You can reach us on 08035183784 for directions.
Absolutely — and we encourage it! CFC is designed as a community space for the whole family. Parents and caregivers are welcome to stay, connect with other families, and be part of the experience. Many of our parents have built lasting friendships through CFC.
You can find us on Instagram at @consciousfamilycenter and on Facebook as Conscious Family Centre. We share daily updates, activity photos, upcoming events, and parenting inspiration. Follow us to stay connected with the CFC community!

A safe, nurturing space where children learn through play, and families grow together.
